title: Use a Coupon or Discount Code
summary: Find and apply a coupon or discount code during online checkout.
learnerPromise: You will be able to find valid coupon codes and apply them correctly during online checkout to pay less.
whyItMatters: Many online stores offer discount codes that are easy to miss. Knowing how to find and use them can lower your total without changing what you buy.
realLifeUses: Finding a first-time buyer discount before placing your order
Applying a seasonal sale code during checkout to get a percentage off
Using a free shipping code to avoid delivery fees
Signing up for a store newsletter to receive a welcome discount
materialsNeeded: An item in your online shopping cart
result: A completed checkout with a coupon code applied, showing the discount.
youWillLearn: Where to look for coupon codes on a store's website or email
How to enter a code in the correct checkout field
How to check that the discount was applied before paying
What to do if a code does not work
miniChallenge: Put an item in your cart on any online store. Search for a coupon code and try applying it at checkout.
steps: Add an item to your cart and go to the checkout page.
Look for a field labeled 'Promo code,' 'Coupon code,' or 'Discount code.'
Search for codes on the store's website, email newsletter, or a trusted coupon site.
Copy and paste or type the code into the field and click apply.
Check that the total price drops before completing your purchase.
completionCriteria: You found at least one coupon code for the store
You entered the code in the correct checkout field
You verified whether the code worked before paying
commonProblems: The code has expired or has restrictions — read the fine print
The code is case-sensitive — copy and paste carefully
Some codes only work for certain items or minimum purchase amounts
tips: Sign up for store emails to get first-time or loyalty discounts
Check the expiration date before relying on a code
If one code does not work, try another — multiple codes may exist
